summary: Paper accounting audit complete. 4 invariants CONFIRMED, 1 invariant FIXED. Dashboard mark-to-market now uses held-side bid price consistently.

changes.description: Fixed mark-to-market calculation to use best_bid instead of current_price. Moved live_equity accumulation inside best_bid availability check to ensure consistency with unrealized_pnl.
changes.summary: Use best_bid for mark-to-market; only accumulate when best_bid available

I1_available_cash.notes: Formula is correct and implemented consistently

I2_live_equity_bid.issue: Used current_price instead of best_bid; accumulated even when best_bid was None
I2_live_equity_bid.fix_applied: Use best_bid consistently; only accumulate when best_bid available

I5_no_double_counting.description: Closed trades cleanly separated from open positions via SQL filters
